title: Airwaves Feat Zillick
lyrics: I can feel my airways, getting crushed in the water waves, lost in your undertow I can feel my airways, getting crushed in the water waves, lost in your undertow Baby slurping through the airwaves, and my brain going insane Love is like a drug coursing through the main vein We can never be the same, never be the same Tell me it would be okay You should tell me I could trust you, be vulnerable Tell you my inner thoughts, but what did you do to me? Now you're sitting back, looking at me like I'm a disease Like I did something wrong, bitch, sneeze There's no allergy here, it's calling in your mind Thinking I'm something lost, when I'm just telling you the thoughts In the undertow of all life You're gonna judge me, you want my fucking life Fucking bitch, sorry it gets this way But I gotta tell you no way I don't want to do this shit ever again, ever again Driving me away I can feel my airways, getting crushed in the water waves, lost in your undertow I can feel my airways, getting crushed in the water waves, lost in your undertow Baby surfing through the airwaves, see my brain going insane Love is like a drug coursing through the main vein We can never be the same, yeah Mayday, mayday, I'm the forecast, it's only pain, everyday never change I work in no place, kinda lame What do you say, break the mold, come out and play It's a great day, light rays touch my face, warm my soul, going cold, there's no way, no Don't you know, no, oh, well come here, take a seat This could take a week, a lesson I have to teach Gonna try not to preach, but you know how things go You can't ever grow, you'll never know the wisdom you take I'm experienced, it's a requirement, no you don't get em all again We're not just average hooligans, stop with all the foolishness You make no sense, they'll come and claim their recompense Through the apocalypse, through the warm eclipse, this is it I can feel my airwaves, getting crushed in the water waves, lost in your undertow I can feel my airwaves, getting crushed in the water waves, lost in your undertow Baby surfing through the airwaves, see my brain going insane Love is like a drug coursing through the main vein We can never be the same, never be the same again And now you tell me you don't want to talk to me Gonna leave me out in the cold Love you

lyricsSegments.text: I can feel my airways, getting crushed in the water waves, lost in your undertow

Love is like a drug coursing through the main vein
We can never be the same, never be the same
Tell me it would be okay

Tell you my inner thoughts, but what did you do to me?
Now you're sitting back, looking at me like I'm a disease
Like I did something wrong, bitch, sneeze
There's no allergy here, it's calling in your mind

This could take a week, a lesson I have to teach
